08-08-2025/08-08-2025/LetsGo/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
08-08-2025/08-08-2025/LetsGo/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce compatibility with the target runtime.

08-08-2025/08-08-2025/LetsGo/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag matching the java.version property.
08-08-2025/08-08-2025/LetsGo/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may not strictly enforce bytecode compatibility with Java 21, potentially leading to runtime issues if APIs from newer versions are used implicitly or if strict cross-compilation is required.

08-08-2025/08-08-2025/LetsGo/src/main/ja.general_idea: Replace wildcard Lombok import with explicit individual imports for better code clarity and maintainability.
